LAW AND MOTION 301, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: COMPLIANCE WITH ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENA. GRANT UNOPPOSED PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING COMPLIANCE WITH ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENA (GOVT. CODE 11187). RESPONDENT ANDALON PARTNERS LLC SHALL SERVE PETITIONER, COMMISSIONER OF THE DEPARTMENT OF FINANCIAL PROTECTION AND INNOVATION ALL DOCUMENTS LISTED IN THE ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENA SERVED ON JULY 22, 2024, WITHOUT OBJECTION, WITHIN 30 DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF ORDER. LAW AND MOTION 301, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: COMPLIANCE WITH ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENA. CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECEMBER 16, 2025. MOVING PARTY HAS NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND MOVING PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY THE COURT'S ORDER OF OCTOBER 8, 2025. BRIEFING DATES ARE AS SET IN THE OCTOBER 8 ORDER, CALCULATED FROM THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE NOTICE OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE TO RESPONDING PARTY AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITH THE COURT NOT LATER THAN FIVE COURT DAYS IN ADVANCE OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: COMPLIANCE WITH ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENA.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: COMPLIANCE WITH ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENA.

Grant unopposed Petition for Order Compelling Compliance with Administrative Subpoena (Govt. Code 11187). Respondent Andalon Partners LLC shall serve Petitioner, Commissioner of the Department of Financial Protection and Innovation all documents listed in the administrative subpoena served on July 22, 2024, without objection, within 30 days after service of order.

Proposed order submitted.

Visiting Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: COMPLIANCE WITH ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENA.
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Continued To Dec-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: COMPLIANCE WITH ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENA.

Continued on the court's own motion to December 16, 2025. Moving party has not filed proof of service of the order to show cause and moving papers as required by the court's order of October 8, 2025. Briefing dates are as set in the October 8 order, calculated from the continued hearing date. Moving party shall provide notice of the continued hearing date to responding party and file proof of service with the court not later than five court days in advance of the continued hearing date.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
